title: SiveKoth
description: The All-in-One King of the Hill plugin for Minecraft 1.21+ with GUI editor, scheduler, holograms, rewards, PlaceholderAPI support, and more!
body:
# SiveKoth - King of the Hill

**SiveKoth** is a powerful and feature-rich King of the Hill (KOTH) plugin designed for Minecraft 1.21+ servers running Paper/Purpur. Create exciting PvP events where players compete to control a zone and earn rewards!

## Features

### Two Game Modes
- **CAPTURE Mode** - Hold the zone for a set amount of time to win
- **SCORE Mode** - Earn points by staying in the zone, highest score wins

### Intuitive GUI Editor
- Easy-to-use graphical interface for arena management
- Create, edit, and delete arenas without commands
- Visual arena status indicators

### Automatic Scheduler
- Schedule events using cron expressions
- Configurable timezone support
- Per-arena scheduling options

### Display Systems
- **BossBar** - Real-time event progress display
- **Scoreboard** - Dynamic event information
- **Holograms** - Using Text Display entities (no dependencies!)
- All displays are fully customizable

### Reward System
- Item rewards with custom NBT data
- Command execution support
- Per-placement rewards (1st, 2nd, 3rd)
- Custom enchantments and lore

### Statistics & Leaderboards
- Track wins, captures, time in zone, and kills
- SQLite and MySQL database support
- Top players hologram display

### PlaceholderAPI Integration
- `%sivekoth_wins%` - Player's total wins
- `%sivekoth_captures%` - Player's total captures
- `%sivekoth_time%` - Time spent in zones
- `%sivekoth_kills%` - Kills in zones
- `%sivekoth_top_<position>_name%` - Top players
- `%sivekoth_arena_<name>_status%` - Arena status
- And more!

### Combat Features
- **Knockout System** - Timer resets when attacked
- Configurable knockout duration
- Fair PvP mechanics

### MiniMessage Support
- Modern MiniMessage formatting
- Gradient colors support
- Fully customizable messages

## Commands

- `/koth` - Main command
- `/koth create <name>` - Create new arena
- `/koth delete <name>` - Delete arena
- `/koth start <name>` - Start event
- `/koth stop <name>` - Stop event
- `/koth wand` - Get selection wand
- `/koth gui` - Open arena manager
- `/koth reload` - Reload configuration

## Permissions

- `sivekoth.admin` - Full admin access
- `sivekoth.use` - Basic usage
- `sivekoth.create` - Create arenas
- `sivekoth.delete` - Delete arenas
- `sivekoth.start` - Start events
- `sivekoth.stop` - Stop events
- `sivekoth.gui` - Access GUI
- `sivekoth.wand` - Use selection wand

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.21+
- **Server**: Paper/Purpur
- **Java**: 21+
- **Optional**: PlaceholderAPI

## Quick Start

1. Download and place the plugin in your `plugins` folder
2. Start your server
3. Use `/koth wand` to get a selection wand
4. Select your capture zone (left-click pos1, right-click pos2)
5. Use `/koth create <name>` to create an arena
6. Use `/koth start <name>` to begin the event!

---

*Made with love by SiveCraft*
